name: Rokgun
description: The Rokgun uses a Dahl barrel to cut recoil sharply without paying the usual damage penalty, leaving it much easier to hold on target than most weapons of its type while still hitting hard. Its large magazine and burst-heavy feel make it strongest up close, where you can simply stay on the trigger and overwhelm targets.
notes: It only appears at green rarity or higher and drops randomly from suitable loot sources. A comparable Scav weapon in Borderlands: The Pre-Sequel is the Shooter.
